properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V1 C3 C4 C3 C4

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Here I stand Forever in your mighty hand Living with your promise Written on my heart I am Yours Surrendered wholly to You You set me in Your family Calling me Your own

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Now I, I belong to You All I need Your Spirit Your Word, Your Truth Hear my cry, my deep desire To know You more In Your Name I will lift my hands to the King This anthem of praise I bring Heaven knows, I long to love You With all I am, I belong to you

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Now I, I belong to You All I need Your Spirit Your Word, Your Truth Hear my cry, my deep desire To know You more In Your Name I will lift my hands to the King This settle praise I bring Heaven knows, I long to love You With all I am

verse.name: C4
verse.lines: In Your Name I will lift my hands to the King This anthem of praise I bring Heaven knows, I long to love You With all I am, I belong to you
